panels.description: Ships tagged dedicated_fleet='trade' for the current player.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ships WHERE dedicated_fleet='trade' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players)

panels.title: Trade Hulls

panels.description: Live tour_run containers in RUNNING state right now.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE command_type='tour_run' AND status='RUNNING'

panels.title: Running Tours (live)

panels.description: Trade hulls with no live container claim, or an idle assignment_status. The relaunch watchlist: nonzero for long means an underused fleet.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ships WHERE dedicated_fleet='trade' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) AND (container_id IS NULL OR assignment_status='idle')

panels.title: Idle Trade Hulls (live)

panels.description: Live nav_status of the trade fleet (docked / in-transit / in-orbit).

targets.rawSql: SELECT nav_status AS "status", COUNT(*) FROM ships WHERE dedicated_fleet='trade' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) GROUP BY 1

panels.title: Nav Status Distribution (trade fleet)

panels.description: One row per trade hull. Duration = elapsed run time for a live tour, or idle time since the last tour_run stopped (since assignment if it has never run). This is the relaunch watchlist.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.ship_symbol AS "Ship", s.nav_status AS "Nav", s.system_symbol AS "System", s.location_symbol AS "Waypoint", CASE WHEN c.status='RUNNING' THEN 'tour running' ELSE 'idle' END AS "Activity", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - CASE WHEN c.status='RUNNING' THEN c.started_at ELSE COALESCE(lastc.stopped_at, s.assigned_at, NOW()) END))/60) AS "Duration (min)" FROM ships s LEFT JOIN containers c ON c.id = s.container_id AND c.status='RUNNING' LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT stopped_at FROM containers cc WHERE cc.command_type='tour_run' AND cc.config::jsonb->>'ship_symbol' = s.ship_symbol AND cc.stopped_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cc.stopped_at DESC LIMIT 1) lastc ON true WHERE s.dedicated_fleet='trade' AND s.player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) ORDER BY (c.status='RUNNING') DESC, 6 DESC

panels.title: Fleet Now — Relaunch Watchlist

panels.description: Trade-fleet TRADING_REVENUE booked in the trailing 1h — already a per-hour rate (no extrapolation).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE category='TRADING_REVENUE'),0) FROM transactions WHERE operation_type='tour' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players)

panels.title: Fleet Gross Revenue (cr/hr, trailing 1h)

panels.description: Trade-fleet net P/L (revenue - costs - fuel) booked in the trailing 1h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM transactions WHERE operation_type='tour' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players)

panels.title: Fleet Net P/L (cr/hr, trailing 1h)

panels.description: Tour TRADING_REVENUE as a share of all-operations TRADING_REVENUE, last 24h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE operation_type='tour' AND category='TRADING_REVENUE') / NULLIF(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE category='TRADING_REVENUE'), 0), 1) FROM transactions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players)

panels.title: Operating Share of Revenue (24h)

panels.description: Tour-tagged ledger P/L per hour (buys, sells, fuel; 15m buckets x4). Duplicated from financial.json.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '15m'), SUM(amount) * 4 AS "tour net/hr" FROM transactions WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND operation_type='tour' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tour Net P/L (cr/hr)

panels.description: Realized vs solver-planned unit prices per leg. Positive buy drift = paying over plan (ladder pressure); negative sell drift = margin decay between plan and execution. Duplicated from financial.json.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(realized_at, '30m'), CASE WHEN is_buy THEN 'buy drift %' ELSE 'sell drift %' END AS metric, AVG((realized_unit_price - planned_unit_price)::numeric / NULLIF(planned_unit_price, 0) * 100) AS "drift" FROM tour_leg_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(realized_at) AND realized_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Plan vs Realized Unit Price Drift %

panels.description: Income-ledger attribution per trade heavy, last 6h. Net includes open inventory (a heavy mid-buy shows negative until it sells). Duplicated from financial.json.

targets.rawSql: SELECT metadata->>'ship_symbol' AS "Ship", SUM(amount) AS "Net", COALESCE(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE category='TRADING_REVENUE'), 0) AS "Revenue", COALESCE(-SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE category IN ('TRADING_COSTS','FUEL_COSTS')), 0) AS "Costs", COUNT(DISTINCT related_entity_id) AS "Runs" FROM transactions WHERE operation_type='tour' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) AND metadata->>'ship_symbol' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC

panels.title: Per-Heavy Tour Profit (6h)

panels.description: Same attribution as the 6h table, widened to 24h to smooth single-tour noise.

targets.rawSql: SELECT metadata->>'ship_symbol' AS "Ship", SUM(amount) AS "Net", COALESCE(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE category='TRADING_REVENUE'), 0) AS "Revenue", COALESCE(-SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE category IN ('TRADING_COSTS','FUEL_COSTS')), 0) AS "Costs", COUNT(DISTINCT related_entity_id) AS "Runs" FROM transactions WHERE operation_type='tour' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) AND metadata->>'ship_symbol' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC

panels.title: Per-Heavy Tour Profit (24h)

panels.description: tour_run containers started in the last 24h (by started_at; independent of when they terminate).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE command_type='tour_run' AND started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Tours Started (24h)

panels.description: tour_run containers that reached COMPLETED in the last 24h (by stopped_at). Includes margins-death — an HONEST completion, not a failure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE command_type='tour_run' AND status='COMPLETED' AND stopped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Completed (24h)

panels.description: tour_run corpses. Travel/claim/crash classes — not margins-death (that is a COMPLETED exit). Duplicated from financial.json.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE command_type='tour_run' AND status='FAILED' AND stopped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Failed (24h)

panels.description: tour_run containers stopped externally (daemon shutdown, claim revoke, operator stop) in the last 24h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE command_type='tour_run' AND status='STOPPED' AND stopped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Stopped (24h)

panels.description: Proxy for margins-death / no-op exits: share of COMPLETED tour_run containers (last 6h) with zero tour-tagged transactions in their [started_at, stopped_at] window. The true ExitReason enum (tourExitStarvation / tourExitUnavailable / tourExitIterations) is only in structured logs and gRPC responses, not Postgres — this is an honest approximation, not the literal classification. A high value here is EXPECTED and not itself a problem (margins-death is a correct no-trade decision, not a failure).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tour_txns = 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) FROM (SELECT c.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions t WHERE t.operation_type='tour' AND t.metadata->>'ship_symbol' = c.config::jsonb->>'ship_symbol' AND t.created_at BETWEEN c.started_at AND c.stopped_at) AS tour_txns FROM containers c WHERE c.command_type='tour_run' AND c.status='COMPLETED' AND c.stopped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours') sub

panels.title: Zero-Trade Completions % (margins-death proxy, 6h)

panels.description: Tour starts (by started_at) and terminal outcomes (by stopped_at) bucketed hourly, last 24h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, '1h'), 'started' AS metric, COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND command_type='tour_run' GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(stopped_at, '1h'), status AS metric, COUNT(*) FROM containers WHERE $__timeFilter(stopped_at) AND command_type='tour_run' AND stopped_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tour Starts & Completions per Hour

panels.description: FAILED tour_run containers over the last 7 days, classified from the raw exit_reason text (cooldown / in-transit conflict / orbit-state conflict / arrival-wait exhausted / other). exit_reason is only populated for FAILED containers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN exit_reason ILIKE '%still on cooldown%' THEN 'cooldown' WHEN exit_reason ILIKE '%currently in-transit from%' THEN 'in-transit-conflict' WHEN exit_reason ILIKE '%not currently in orbit%' THEN 'orbit-state-conflict' WHEN exit_reason ILIKE '%arrival wait exhausted%' THEN 'arrival-wait-exhausted' WHEN exit_reason IS NULL OR exit_reason = '' THEN '(none)' ELSE 'other' END AS "Exit Class", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM containers WHERE command_type='tour_run' AND status='FAILED' AND stopped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: FAILED Exit-Reason Breakdown (7d)

panels.description: Live market_absorption_ledger rows written by the tour engine (engine='tour'), not yet expired. PLANNED = reservation held for a planned leg; EXECUTED = recovery shadow from a completed trade.

targets.rawSql: SELECT waypoint_symbol AS "Waypoint", good_symbol AS "Good", side AS "Side", state AS "State", SUM(units) AS "Units", MAX(tranche_size) AS "Tranche", MAX(tier_at_write) AS "Tier", ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - created_at))) / 60) AS "Age (min)", ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (expires_at - NOW()))) / 60) AS "TTL (min)" FROM market_absorption_ledger WHERE expires_at > NOW() AND engine='tour' GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 ORDER BY SUM(units) DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Outstanding Absorption by Market/Good (engine=tour)

panels.description: Open PLANNED reservations (engine='tour') attributed to the owning hull via containers.config->>'ship_symbol'.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(c.config::jsonb->>'ship_symbol', 'unassigned') AS "Ship", COUNT(*) AS "Planned Reservations", SUM(mal.units) AS "Units" FROM market_absorption_ledger mal LEFT JOIN containers c ON c.id = mal.container_id WHERE mal.engine = 'tour' AND mal.state = 'PLANNED' AND mal.expires_at > NOW() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: PLANNED Reservations by Hull

panels.description: market_data freshness in the systems currently hosting trade-fleet ships. Freshest/Stalest are minutes since last_updated across that system's markets.

targets.rawSql: SELECT split_part(waypoint_symbol,'-',1)||'-'||split_part(waypoint_symbol,'-',2) AS "System", COUNT(*) AS "Markets", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(last_updated)))/60) AS "Freshest (min ago)", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(last_updated)))/60) AS "Stalest (min ago)" FROM market_data WHERE split_part(waypoint_symbol,'-',1)||'-'||split_part(waypoint_symbol,'-',2) IN (SELECT DISTINCT system_symbol FROM ships WHERE dedicated_fleet='trade' AND player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players)) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Market Freshness — Systems Hosting Trade Fleet

panels.description: Latest balance_after from the transaction ledger (exact; updates with every transaction). The daemon gauge is P14 — it oscillates 0<->balance (conflicting writers).

targets.rawSql: SELECT balance_after AS "treasury" FROM transactions WHERE player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Treasury (live)

panels.description: Treasury minus the 50k working-capital reserve floor (buy-time guard; tours shrink or skip buys that would pierce it). Duplicated from financial.json.

targets.rawSql: SELECT balance_after - 50000 FROM transactions WHERE player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Headroom Above Reserve Floor

panels.description: Per-tour spend (TRADING_COSTS + FUEL_COSTS) vs a 25%-of-treasury-at-start proxy for the coordinator's defaultMaxSpend() resolution (RULINGS #6). The cap is resolved once per tour from live treasury at plan time and is not itself persisted to Postgres — 'Treasury@Start' is the last known balance_after at or before started_at, so 'Cap Proxy' approximates but is not guaranteed to equal the value the coordinator actually used. Last 6h, most recent first.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.id AS "Tour", c.config::jsonb->>'ship_symbol' AS "Ship", c.started_at AS "Started", treas.balance_after AS "Treasury@Start", ROUND(treas.balance_after * 0.25) AS "Cap Proxy (25%)", COALESCE(spend.tour_spend,0) AS "Tour Spend", ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(spend.tour_spend,0) / NULLIF(treas.balance_after * 0.25,0),1) AS "% of Cap" FROM containers c LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT balance_after FROM transactions t2 WHERE t2.created_at <= c.started_at AND t2.player_id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM players) ORDER BY t2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) treas ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT SUM(-amount) AS tour_spend FROM transactions t3 WHERE t3.operation_type='tour' AND t3.category IN ('TRADING_COSTS','FUEL_COSTS') AND t3.metadata->>'ship_symbol' = c.config::jsonb->>'ship_symbol' AND t3.created_at BETWEEN c.started_at AND COALESCE(c.stopped_at, NOW())) spend ON true WHERE c.command_type='tour_run' AND c.started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ORDER BY c.started_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Per-Tour Spend vs 25%-Treasury Cap Proxy (6h)

panels.description: sp-fbih P11: the REAL tour-run exit-reason enum as a labeled counter (tour_exit_total{reason=iterations_exhausted|starvation|tour_unavailable}), counted at every HONEST completion. The definitive replacement for the zero-trade-completions margins-death proxy and the FAILED exit_reason text-parse beside it. promQL history starts at deploy; the PG proxies retain full history.
panels.title: Tour Exit Reasons — real (per hour)

panels.description: sp-fbih P4: confirmed 3-strike ground tap-outs (tour_margins_death_total), counted whether or not a reposition then rescues the run — the ground rich->tapped cadence. The real twin of the 'Zero-Trade Completions %' margins-death proxy in this section.
panels.title: Margins Deaths — real (per hour)

panels.description: sp-fbih P3: margins-death reposition evaluations by outcome (tour_repositions_total{outcome=success|no_candidate|failed}). The no_candidate rate is the map-wide margin-exhaustion signal (nowhere jump-reachable clears the reposition floor); success shows rank->jump->replan earning its jump cost.
panels.title: Repositions by Outcome — real (per hour)

panels.description: sp-fbih P12: tour_run container wall-time at honest completion (tour_duration_seconds), scoped to tour_run only — the existing container histogram is keyed by container_type=TRADING, which blends tour/arb/route/stocker and is unsafe for a duration histogram. 6h rate window pools enough completions for the quantiles.
panels.title: Tour Duration p50/p95 — real

panels.description: sp-fbih P13: the RESOLVED per-tour dynamic spend cap (tour_resolved_max_spend, in credits), recorded each time defaultMaxSpend resolves 25% of live treasury (RULINGS #6). The exact value the 'Per-Tour Spend vs 25%-Treasury Cap Proxy' table beside it approximates from balance_after x 0.25.
panels.title: Resolved Dynamic Cap — real (25% treasury)

panels.description: sp-fbih P5: buy-time working-capital floor engagements (tour_reserve_floor_engagements_total{action=skip|shrink}). Frequent 'shrink' means the 25%-of-treasury caps outrun liquidity — the working-capital reserve sizing signal.
panels.title: Reserve-Floor Engagements — real (per hour)
